response.original_title: ATEEZ: LIGHT THE WAY IN CINEMAS
response.overview: One day, a mysterious message arrives for ATEEZ, who had been spending a peaceful time in their hideout. At that moment, everything began to change. ATINY has vanished… As if under a spell, ATEEZ wanders through a dreamlike wasteland, into a collapsing world engulfed in flames, and the Dark City veiled in dense fog. Pursued by an unknown force, ATEEZ begins to fight back to find ATINY. Experience an intense immersion where every second counts with INCEPTION, an explosion of freedom and energy in the global hit BOUNCY (K-HOT CHILLI PEPPERS), and the pinnacle of refined charisma with Ice On My Teeth, now reimagined for the big screen. The world-class cinematic VR concert that captivated audiences around the globe has been fully refitted for cinemas, bringing ATEEZ's electrifying performances to life on the largest stage of all.
response.title: ATEEZ: LIGHT THE WAY IN CINEMAS
